_comment: Copy this file to ~/.pi/agent/extensions/sandbox.json (global) or <cwd>/.pi/sandbox.json (project-local). Project-local values are merged on top of global. See README.md for full documentation.

network._comment_allowedDomains: Domains that fetch_content / get_search_content may reach. Empty list = allow all.

filesystem._comment_denyRead: Layer 1 (bash) AND Layer 2 (model read tool). Neither subprocesses nor the model read tool may access these.
filesystem._comment_modelDenyRead: Layer 2 ONLY. Token/credential files inside dirs that CLI tools (gh, aws, kubectl, docker) need to read. The model's `read` tool is blocked; subprocesses still work. Caveat: the model could `bash cat` these — `denyRead` is the hard block for that.
filesystem._comment_allowWrite: Layer 2: the model's write/edit tools may only write inside these roots. '.' = cwd.
filesystem._comment_denyWrite: Layer 1 + Layer 2: writes always blocked regardless of allowWrite.

_comment_subagent: Layer 3: stricter network policy when ctx.hasUI === false (subagents, -p mode, JSON mode).
_comment_overrides: Additive overrides written by ask-tier prompts. You can also edit by hand. These are merged on top of the main policy.
